title: jSACSMA: a differentiable JAX implementation of SAC-SMA coupled with Snow-17
description:
Dual-backend (JAX + NumPy) implementation of the Sacramento Soil Moisture Accounting model (SAC-SMA) with optional Snow-17 coupling — usable standalone or as a SYMFLUENCE plugin.

Part of the SYMFLUENCE JAX-native model family, described in the paper series accompanying SYMFLUENCE (Eythorsson et al., 2026, Water Resources Research).
